---
title: "Contact"
---

I am interested in opportunities in machine learning, data science, applied research, computational neuroscience, and biomedical AI.

## Email

[ar0621@princeton.edu](mailto:ar0621@princeton.edu)  

## Links

- **LinkedIn:** [Anuththara Rupasinghe](https://www.linkedin.com/in/anuththara-rupasinghe-b1566b122/)  
- **Google Scholar:** [Google Scholar Profile](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=6TQuQqsAAAAJ&hl=en)  
- **GitHub:** [Anuththara-Rupasinghe](https://github.com/Anuththara-Rupasinghe)
- **CV:** [Download CV](cv.pdf)

## Location

New Jersey / New York area  
Open to research scientist, applied scientist, machine learning, data science, computational neuroscience, and biomedical AI roles.
